svg.title: Taylor truncation of sin(x): accuracy vs. expansion order
svg.desc: Two stacked panels from 0 to 1.6 radians. Upper: exact sin(x) and three truncations (order 1, 3, 5). Lower: absolute errors of each truncation starting at zero. Vertical lines mark 5 and 15 degrees.

cajal:figure.figure-title: Taylor truncation of sin(x): accuracy vs. expansion order
cajal:figure.author: Humanitarians AI Incorporated

svg.text: Taylor truncation: higher order gives greater accuracy over a wider range
